beats.a0_2: {ROUTE_A_APPROACH} offers {HERO} two ways in: press hard and risk being noticed by whatever {DEADLINE_SIGN} answers to, or wait and let {THRESHOLD} keep its secret a while longer
beats.a0_3a: pressed directly, {ROUTE_A_APPROACH} yields a hard specific fact that will not sit still in {HERO}'s mind and points deeper under the tideline
beats.a0_3b: watching {ROUTE_A_APPROACH} from the edge, {HERO} can fold the quiet detail into what she knows, or let the cold and the late hour pull her attention away before she has understood it
beats.a0_4: both readings of {ROUTE_A_APPROACH} settle on the same small impossibility, and {HERO} feels the flooded floor tilt the whole building toward one question

beats.mA_2: {ROUTE_MA_THREAD} can be read as {DEADLINE_SIGN} leaves it, changed, or dried and forced back to what it first said; each choice costs {HERO} something of the truth
beats.mA_3: the revision of {ROUTE_MA_THREAD} proves more honest than the original, and the discovery pulls {HERO} toward the second pivot
beats.mA_4: {ROUTE_MA_THREAD} names a thing {THRESHOLD} was never meant to shelve; {HERO} can carry the contradiction toward what the building truly holds, or seal this vault and save only itself
beats.mA_5: with {ROUTE_MA_THREAD} rewritten in her hands, {HERO} climbs toward the second question under all the others: what {THRESHOLD} was actually built to hold

beats.nA_1: {HERO} comes to {ROUTE_NA_CONFIDANT}; {NA_GATE} waits like held weather, and the salt light off {DEADLINE_SIGN} makes the room feel underwater already
beats.nA_pad_s1: {HERO} trades honesty for honesty with {ROUTE_NA_CONFIDANT}, and each thing she admits about herself unlocks another turn of {NA_GATE}, {DEADLINE_SIGN} rising past the sill as they speak
beats.nA_pad_s2: {HERO} trades honesty for honesty with {ROUTE_NA_CONFIDANT}, and each thing she admits about herself unlocks another turn of {NA_GATE}, {DEADLINE_SIGN} rising past the sill as they speak

beats.nA_2: {ROUTE_NA_CONFIDANT} will answer {HERO} honestly only if she gives something true in return; she can offer her own doubt, or keep her distance and take only what is freely shown
beats.nA_3: in exchange, {ROUTE_NA_CONFIDANT} gives {HERO} the last turn of the story, and it points at a document with her own name where no name of hers should be
beats.nA_4: {ROUTE_NA_CONFIDANT} sets the impossible page before {HERO}; she can carry it to the third pivot and face it, or refuse the page and keep the version of herself she arrived with
beats.nA_5: with what {ROUTE_NA_CONFIDANT} has given her, {HERO} climbs to the last turn, where {THRESHOLD} stops being about {TOWN} and becomes about the keeper who came to save it
beats.nA_e1: {HERO} keeps her distance from {ROUTE_NA_CONFIDANT} and takes only what is safe to take; she leaves with facts and without the truth, dry and unchanged and a little ashamed
beats.nA_e2: {HERO} refuses the page {ROUTE_NA_CONFIDANT} offers and stays the woman she was; she preserves her own settled story and never learns what {THRESHOLD} wrote in her name

beats.r1_dsc_s1: {HERO} commits to {ROUTE_R1_RESOLVE} and starts down into the flooding stair, {DEADLINE_SIGN} black and rising, her lantern the only warm thing left in the drowned dark

beats.r1_1: {HERO} sets herself to {ROUTE_R1_RESOLVE}; the choice settles in her chest like ballast, and {THRESHOLD} seems flooded and leaning in to watch how she will keep it
beats.r1_2: {ROUTE_R1_RESOLVE} can be done gently, saving the fragile first, or decisively, taking the whole weight at once while {DEADLINE_SIGN} still climbs
beats.r1_3a: working gently at {ROUTE_R1_RESOLVE}, {HERO} reaches a fork: trust {CONTRIBUTOR} to carry half the burden, or bear it alone and spare her the cost
beats.r1_3b: taking the whole weight of {ROUTE_R1_RESOLVE}, {HERO} must choose fast: follow {FOUNDER}'s method to the letter, or break from {FOUNDER} and do it her own way
beats.r1_aft_s1: the two ways of {ROUTE_R1_RESOLVE} rejoin on the narrow stair, {DEADLINE_SIGN} at her knees, one lantern left, and {HERO} works upward through the cold toward the last of the choosing
beats.r1_aft_s2: the two ways of {ROUTE_R1_RESOLVE} rejoin on the narrow stair, {DEADLINE_SIGN} at her knees, one lantern left, and {HERO} works upward through the cold toward the last of the choosing
beats.r1_aft_s3: the two ways of {ROUTE_R1_RESOLVE} rejoin on the narrow stair, {DEADLINE_SIGN} at her knees, one lantern left, and {HERO} works upward through the cold toward the last of the choosing
beats.r1_4: whichever hand she used, {ROUTE_R1_RESOLVE} now comes down to what {HERO} is willing to give up, and the outcome narrows to a single stair
beats.r1_5: at the last landing of {ROUTE_R1_RESOLVE}, {HERO} weighs {TOWN}'s claim against her own; she can put {TOWN} first, or put the single irreplaceable thing first
beats.r1_6: choosing {TOWN} in {ROUTE_R1_RESOLVE}, {DEADLINE_SIGN} offers a final bargain: speak the forgotten thing aloud to the whole of {TOWN}, or keep it and simply hold the line here
beats.r1_7: choosing the single thing in {ROUTE_R1_RESOLVE}, {HERO} must decide how it survives: carried out into the storm now, or sealed high and left for the morning
beats.r1_8: sealing the one thing of {ROUTE_R1_RESOLVE} above {DEADLINE}, {HERO} has a breath to decide whether to leave it for the salvage crew, or to settle the record herself
beats.r1_9: at the very last of {ROUTE_R1_RESOLVE}, {HERO} holds the pen over the salvage log: sign it in her own true name, or leave the record unclaimed for whoever keeps {THRESHOLD} next
beats.r1_ea: at the end of {ROUTE_R1_RESOLVE}, {R1_OUTCOME_A}; {DEADLINE_SIGN} holds its level a moment as if listening, and {HERO} lets the night close on the choice she has made

beats.r2_dsc_s1: {HERO} commits to {ROUTE_R2_RESOLVE} and starts down into the flooding stair, {DEADLINE_SIGN} black and rising, her lantern the only warm thing left in the drowned dark
beats.r2_dsc_s2: {HERO} commits to {ROUTE_R2_RESOLVE} and starts down into the flooding stair, {DEADLINE_SIGN} black and rising, her lantern the only warm thing left in the drowned dark
beats.r2_dsc_s3: {HERO} commits to {ROUTE_R2_RESOLVE} and starts down into the flooding stair, {DEADLINE_SIGN} black and rising, her lantern the only warm thing left in the drowned dark
beats.r2_dsc_s4: {HERO} commits to {ROUTE_R2_RESOLVE} and starts down into the flooding stair, {DEADLINE_SIGN} black and rising, her lantern the only warm thing left in the drowned dark
beats.r2_1: {HERO} sets herself to {ROUTE_R2_RESOLVE}; the choice settles in her chest like ballast, and {THRESHOLD} seems flooded and leaning in to watch how she will keep it
beats.r2_2: {ROUTE_R2_RESOLVE} can be done gently, saving the fragile first, or decisively, taking the whole weight at once while {DEADLINE_SIGN} still climbs
beats.r2_3a: working gently at {ROUTE_R2_RESOLVE}, {HERO} reaches a fork: trust {CONTRIBUTOR} to carry half the burden, or bear it alone and spare her the cost
beats.r2_3b: taking the whole weight of {ROUTE_R2_RESOLVE}, {HERO} must choose fast: follow {FOUNDER}'s method to the letter, or break from {FOUNDER} and do it her own way
beats.r2_aft_s1: the two ways of {ROUTE_R2_RESOLVE} rejoin on the narrow stair, {DEADLINE_SIGN} at her knees, one lantern left, and {HERO} works upward through the cold toward the last of the choosing
beats.r2_aft_s2: the two ways of {ROUTE_R2_RESOLVE} rejoin on the narrow stair, {DEADLINE_SIGN} at her knees, one lantern left, and {HERO} works upward through the cold toward the last of the choosing
beats.r2_aft_s3: the two ways of {ROUTE_R2_RESOLVE} rejoin on the narrow stair, {DEADLINE_SIGN} at her knees, one lantern left, and {HERO} works upward through the cold toward the last of the choosing
beats.r2_4: whichever hand she used, {ROUTE_R2_RESOLVE} now comes down to what {HERO} is willing to give up, and the outcome narrows to a single stair
beats.r2_5: at the last landing of {ROUTE_R2_RESOLVE}, {HERO} weighs {TOWN}'s claim against her own; she can put {TOWN} first, or put the single irreplaceable thing first
beats.r2_6: choosing {TOWN} in {ROUTE_R2_RESOLVE}, {DEADLINE_SIGN} offers a final bargain: speak the forgotten thing aloud to the whole of {TOWN}, or keep it and simply hold the line here
beats.r2_7: choosing the single thing in {ROUTE_R2_RESOLVE}, {HERO} must decide how it survives: carried out into the storm now, or sealed high and left for the morning
beats.r2_8: sealing the one thing of {ROUTE_R2_RESOLVE} above {DEADLINE}, {HERO} has a breath to decide whether to leave it for the salvage crew, or to settle the record herself
beats.r2_9: at the very last of {ROUTE_R2_RESOLVE}, {HERO} holds the pen over the salvage log: sign it in her own true name, or leave the record unclaimed for whoever keeps {THRESHOLD} next
beats.r2_ea: at the end of {ROUTE_R2_RESOLVE}, {R2_OUTCOME_A}; {DEADLINE_SIGN} holds its level a moment as if listening, and {HERO} lets the night close on the choice she has made

beats.n_start: {HERO} arrives as new keeper of {THRESHOLD} above {TOWN} on {OPENING_MOMENT} and the oldest vaults begin to drink {DEADLINE_SIGN}, and four ways to meet the drowning open before her
beats.p1: every approach converges here: {DEADLINE} does not rise blindly but climbs toward particular shelves, taking first the records {TOWN} most wanted gone, and {HERO} finally sees the pattern in the ruin
beats.p1_reveal: {DEADLINE_SIGN} reads {THRESHOLD} like an index of shame, and {HERO} understands the flood is a choosing; she must decide how to test the choosing before it reaches the middle vaults
beats.p1_gate: four threads lead deeper from the choosing {DEADLINE}: {ROUTE_MA_THREAD}, {ROUTE_MB_THREAD}, {ROUTE_MC_THREAD}, and {ROUTE_MD_THREAD}
beats.p2: the four threads reconverge and answer together: {THRESHOLD} was never built to keep {TOWN}'s records but to hold everything {TOWN} chose to forget, a covenant with its own unremembering, and {DEADLINE_SIGN} has come to call the covenant in
beats.p2_reveal: {FOUNDER} did not build a library, {HERO} realises, but a lung for {TOWN}'s shame, breathing what could not be said; {DEADLINE} is {TOWN}'s own held breath let go at last
beats.p2_gate: three ways remain to test the covenant before it drowns: {ROUTE_NA_CONFIDANT}, {ROUTE_NB_CONFIDANT}, and {ROUTE_NC_CONFIDANT}
beats.p3: all three threads meet on one impossible sheet: {HERO}'s own name, in her own hand, signing an entry dated before she was ever hired, as though {THRESHOLD} had been waiting for a keeper it already knew
beats.p3_reveal: the entry records a promise: that the last keeper would decide what {TOWN} is allowed to remember, and {HERO} sees the flood has only ever been asking her to choose
beats.p3_name: she reads her own signed words to their end while {DEADLINE_SIGN} laps the top step, and the whole of {TOWN}'s memory now waits on what she does before dawn
beats.p3_gate: four ways to answer {THRESHOLD}'s drowning lie open, and each keeps a different thing: {TOWN} made whole, one saved treasure, peace with what cannot be kept, or the honest small salvage of a losing night
